title: Browser vs Search Engine
drDigitalIntro:
A browser and a search engine do different jobs.
• The browser is the app that shows you websites — like a car.
• A search engine like Google helps you find websites — like a map.
• You can use Google, Bing, or DuckDuckGo, all inside the browser.

playgroundTask.goal: Use a search engine inside your browser

steps.say: This whole window is the browser — your browser. Google is a search engine you visit inside it. Type google.com in the address bar and press Enter.
Now use the search engine to find something. Type apple pie recipe in the search box and press Enter.

drDigitalSuccess: You used Google (a search engine) inside the browser (a browser). The browser shows websites; the search engine helps you find them.
drDigitalHint: First go to google.com in the address bar. Then type your search into the search box on the Google page.
